## Checklist

- [ ] Uses `WinnowColors` / `WinnowTypography` / `WinnowSpacing` — no hardcoded values
- [ ] Assist diamond appears wherever on-device intelligence surfaces a result
- [ ] No new server calls introduced (privacy invariant)
- [ ] `WinnowCore` still has no UIKit/AppKit/SwiftUI imports
